name: agent_readiness
description: Assess agent readiness for promotion across environments (dev -> staging -> production). Evaluates eval scores, capability coverage, and governance compliance.
intent: Evaluate whether an agent is ready for environment promotion

outputs.name: conditions
outputs.description: Conditions that must be met for conditional readiness

agentInstructions: Read the agent's eval results, capability inventory, and governance compliance status. Apply promotion criteria for the target environment. Fail-closed on missing evidence — if eval data is incomplete, verdict is not_ready.
